title: Chat Customization
description: Light-weight plugin for formatting chat messages.
body:
Simple light-weight plugin for formatting and processing chat messages sent by players. Decent Chat allows you to modify the traditional `<player> message` format to whatever you want, for instance `player: message` or even `player » message`, as seen on some popular servers.

Decent Chat also supports coloring your own name using the `/color` command, you can even set your name to a gradient!

On top of that, there are also various activity adjustments that can be done. Such as changing the join/leave message and notifying the rest of the server when someone sleeps, aswell as announcing when someone goes to the nether/the end!\
![activity preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d97d4acb5f1fb443db9a09888776c3f2b593f36.png)

Last off, Decent Chat includes built-in emoji support, allowing text-based symbols to be transformed into anything you want. All which can be modified/disabled in the `config.yml` file.\
![emoji preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5afa661ed46bd934c0fa8d75f456007f70d64194.png)


The goal of Decent Chat is to stay light weight, which makes it a great addition to any server with an active chat, such as a Survival Multiplayer server!
